svg.title: Bloom's Taxonomy Interactive Diagram
svg.desc: Interactive visualization of Bloom's Taxonomy showing the Knowledge Dimension (Factual, Conceptual, Procedural, Metacognitive) and Cognitive Process Dimension (Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, Create). Click any section to learn more.

a.aria-label: Metacognitive - Knowledge of cognition in general and awareness of one's own cognition
a.title: Click to learn about Metacognitive Knowledge

a.aria-label: Procedural - How to do something, methods of inquiry, and criteria for using skills
a.title: Click to learn about Procedural Knowledge

a.aria-label: Conceptual - The interrelationship among basic elements within a larger structure
a.title: Click to learn about Conceptual Knowledge

a.aria-label: Factual - The basic elements students must know to be acquainted with a discipline
a.title: Click to learn about Factual Knowledge

a.aria-label: Remember - Retrieve relevant knowledge from long-term memory
a.title: Click to learn about Remember

a.aria-label: Understand - Construct meaning from instructional messages
a.title: Click to learn about Understand

a.aria-label: Apply - Carry out or use a procedure in a given situation
a.title: Click to learn about Apply

a.aria-label: Analyze - Break material into parts and determine how they relate to each other
a.title: Click to learn about Analyze

a.aria-label: Evaluate - Make judgments based on criteria and standards
a.title: Click to learn about Evaluate

a.aria-label: Create - Put elements together to form a coherent whole or reorganize into a new pattern
a.title: Click to learn about Create

a.aria-label: Generate - Generate a lot of daily activities
a.title: Generate - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Assemble - Assemble a team of experts
a.title: Assemble - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Design - Design an efficient project workflow
a.title: Design - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Create - Create an innovative learning portfolio
a.title: Create - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Check - Check for consistency among sources
a.title: Check - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Determine - Determine relevance of results
a.title: Determine - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Judge - Judge efficiency of sampling techniques
a.title: Judge - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Reflect - Reflect on one's progress
a.title: Reflect - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Select - Select the most complete list of activities
a.title: Select - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Differentiate - Differentiate high and low culture
a.title: Differentiate - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Integrate - Integrate compliance with regulations
a.title: Integrate - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Deconstruct - Deconstruct one's biases
a.title: Deconstruct - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Respond - Respond to frequently asked questions
a.title: Respond - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Provide - Provide advice to novices
a.title: Provide - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Carry out - Carry out pH tests of water samples
a.title: Carry out - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Use - Use techniques that match one's strengths
a.title: Use - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Summarize - Summarize features of a new product
a.title: Summarize - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Classify - Classify adhesives by toxicity
a.title: Classify - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Clarify - Clarify assembly instructions
a.title: Clarify - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Predict - Predict one's response to culture shock
a.title: Predict - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: List - List primary and secondary colors
a.title: List - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Recognize - Recognize symptoms of exhaustion
a.title: Recognize - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Recall - Recall how to perform CPR
a.title: Recall - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Identify - Identify strategies for retaining information
a.title: Identify - Click to learn more

a.aria-label: Learn about the Cognitive Process Dimension
a.title: Click to learn about The Cognitive Process Dimension

a.aria-label: Learn about the Knowledge Dimension
a.title: Click to learn about The Knowledge Dimension
